27707.title: Measuring Customer Churn and Interconnectedness
27707.zh_title: 衡量客户流失与相互关联性
27707.authors: Scott R. Baker, Brian Baugh, Marco C. Sammon
27707.abstract: This paper demonstrates that it is possible to construct accurate pictures of firm revenue, growth, geographic dispersion, and customer base characteristics using an increasingly accessible class of consumer financial transaction data. We develop two new measures which characterize firms' customer bases: the rate of churn in a firm's customer base and a metric of the pairwise similarity between firms' customer bases. We show that these measures provide important insights into the behavior of both real firm decisions and firm asset prices. Rates of customer churn affect the level and volatility of firm-level investment, markups, and profits. Churn also affects how quickly firms respond to shocks in the value of their growth options (i.e. Tobin's~Q). Moreover, high churn firms tended to face steeper declines in consumer spending during the recent COVID-19 outbreak. Similarity between firms' customer bases highlights one under-explored type of predictability among stock returns -- we demonstrate that significant alpha can be generated using a trading strategy that exploits our index of customer base similarity across firms.
27707.zh_abstract: 本文证明，利用日益可获取的一类消费者金融交易数据，可以构建出关于企业收入、增长、地理分布和客户基础特征的准确图景。我们开发了两个衡量企业客户基础的新指标：企业客户流失率，以及衡量企业间客户基础成对相似性的指标。我们表明，这些指标为理解真实企业决策和企业资产价格行为提供了重要见解。客户流失率影响企业层面投资、加成率和利润的水平与波动性。客户流失还影响企业对其增长期权价值（即托宾Q）冲击的反应速度。此外，在近期新冠疫情爆发期间，高客户流失率企业往往面临消费者支出更急剧的下降。企业间客户基础的相似性揭示了股票收益中一种未被充分探索的可预测性——我们证明，利用我们构建的企业间客户基础相似性指数的交易策略可以产生显著的阿尔法收益。

27706.title: History as Evolution
27706.abstract: In this chapter, I consider the benefits of viewing history through an evolutionary lens. In recent decades, a field of research has emerged, which builds on foundations from biological evolution to study culture within an evolutionary framework. I begin the chapter by discussing the theory behind cultural evolution and the empirical evidence supporting its ability to explain the history of human societies. I then turn to a discussion of how an evolutionary perspective provides important insights into a range of phenomena within economics, including a deeper understanding of human capital, innovation, gender roles, the consequences of warfare, the effects of market competition, why we observe historical persistence and path dependence, and, most importantly, why sustained economic growth is often so elusive. I end by turning to a summary of a growing body of research within economics that has made progress in improving our understanding of cultural evolution and, thus, contributing to evolutionary disciplines outside of economics.
27706.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我探讨了通过演化视角审视历史的益处。近几十年来，一个研究领域兴起，它基于生物演化的基础，在演化框架内研究文化。我首先讨论文化演化背后的理论，以及支持其解释人类社会历史的经验证据。接着，我转向讨论演化视角如何为经济学中的一系列现象提供重要见解，包括对人力资本、创新、性别角色、战争后果、市场竞争效应、历史持续性与路径依赖的更深理解，以及最重要的是，为何持续的经济增长常常如此难以实现。最后，我总结了经济学中日益增长的研究成果，这些研究在增进我们对文化演化的理解方面取得了进展，从而为经济学之外的演化学科做出了贡献。
27706.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：C73, N01, N10, Z1

27705.title: The Tax Elasticity of Capital Gains and Revenue-Maximizing Rates
27705.zh_title: 资本利得的税收弹性与收入最大化税率
27705.abstract: This paper uses a direct-projections approach to estimate the effect of capital gains taxation on realizations at the state level, and then develops a framework for determining revenue-maximizing rates at the federal level. We find that the elasticity of revenues with respect to the tax rate over a ten-year period is -0.5 to -0.3, indicating that capital gains tax cuts do not pay for themselves, and that a 5 percentage point rate increase would yield $\$18$ to $\$30$ billion in annual federal tax revenue. Our long-run estimates yield revenue-maximizing capital gains tax rates of 38 to 47 percent.
27705.zh_abstract: 本文使用直接预测方法估计州级资本利得税对实现收益的影响，然后构建一个框架来确定联邦层面的收入最大化税率。我们发现，十年期内税收收入相对于税率的弹性为-0.5至-0.3，表明资本利得减税并不能自给自足，而税率提高5个百分点将使联邦年度税收收入增加180亿至300亿美元。我们的长期估计得出收入最大化的资本利得税率为38%至47%。
27705.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：H0, H2, H21, H24, H71, R5

27704.title: Nonparametric Identification of Differentiated Products Demand Using Micro Data
27704.zh_title: 使用微观数据对差异化产品需求进行非参数识别
27704.authors: Steven T. Berry, Philip A. Haile
27704.abstract: A recent literature considers the identification of heterogeneous demand and supply models via "quasi-experimental'' variation, as from instrumental variables. In this paper we establish nonparametric identification of differentiated products demand when one has "micro data'' linking characteristics of individual consumers to their choices. Micro data provide a panel structure allowing one to exploit variation across consumers within each market, where latent demand shocks are fixed. This facilitates richer demand specifications while substantially softening the reliance on instrumental variables, reducing both the number and types of instruments required. Our results require neither the structure of a "special regressor'' nor a "full support'' assumption on consumer-level observables.
27704.zh_abstract: 近期的文献考虑通过“准实验”变异（如工具变量）来识别异质性需求与供给模型。在本文中，我们建立了当拥有将个体消费者特征与其选择联系起来的“微观数据”时，差异化产品需求的非参数识别。微观数据提供了面板结构，允许利用每个市场内消费者之间的变异，其中潜在需求冲击是固定的。这促进了更丰富的需求设定，同时大幅减轻了对工具变量的依赖，减少了所需工具的数量和类型。我们的结果既不需要“特殊回归变量”的结构，也不需要对消费者层面可观测变量做出“完全支撑”假设。

27703.title: When Uncle Sam Introduced Main Street to Wall Street: Liberty Bonds and the Transformation of American Finance
27703.zh_title: 当山姆大叔将主街引入华尔街：自由债券与美国金融的转型
27703.authors: Eric Hilt, Matthew S. Jaremski, Wendy Rahn
27703.abstract: We study the effects of the liberty bond drives of World War I on financial intermediation in the 1920s and beyond. Using panel data on U.S. counties, and an instrument that captures differences in the approaches used to market the bonds, we find that higher liberty bond subscription rates led to an increase in investment banks and a contraction in commercial bank assets. We also find that in the late 1930s, individuals residing in states where liberty bond subscription rates had been higher were more likely to report owning stocks or bonds. Although they were conducted to support the American effort in World War I, the liberty loan drives reshaped American finance.
27703.zh_abstract: 我们研究第一次世界大战的自由债券运动对20世纪20年代及以后金融中介的影响。使用美国县级面板数据以及一个捕捉债券营销方法差异的工具变量，我们发现更高的自由债券认购率导致投资银行增加和商业银行资产收缩。我们还发现，在20世纪30年代末，居住在自由债券认购率较高州的个人更可能报告拥有股票或债券。尽管自由贷款运动是为了支持美国在一战中的努力，但它们重塑了美国金融体系。
27703.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, ME, PE, POL；JEL：N12, N22, N42

27702.title: Confidence and the Propagation of Demand Shocks
27702.zh_title: 信心与需求冲击的传播
27702.abstract: We revisit the question of why shifts in aggregate demand drive business cycles. Our theory combines intertemporal substitution in production with rational confusion, or bounded rationality, in consumption and investment. The first element allows aggregate supply to respond to shifts in aggregate demand without nominal rigidity. The second introduces a “confidence multiplier,” that is, a positive feedback loop between real economic activity, consumer expectations of permanent income, and investor expectations of returns. This mechanism amplifies the business-cycle fluctuations triggered by demand shocks (but not necessarily those triggered by supply shocks); it helps investment to comove with consumption; and it allows front-loaded fiscal stimuli to crowd in private spending.
27702.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视为何总需求变动驱动经济周期的问题。我们的理论结合了生产中的跨期替代与消费和投资中的理性混淆或有限理性。第一个要素允许总供给在没有名义刚性的情况下对总需求变动做出反应。第二个要素引入了“信心乘数”，即实际经济活动、消费者对永久收入的预期以及投资者对回报的预期之间的正反馈循环。这一机制放大了由需求冲击（但不一定是由供给冲击）引发的经济周期波动；它有助于投资与消费共同变动；并允许前置的财政刺激挤出私人支出。

27701.title: Bank Syndicates and Liquidity Provision
27701.zh_title: 银行银团与流动性提供
27701.authors: Joao A. C. Santos, S. Vish Viswanathan
27701.abstract: We provide evidence that credit lines offer liquidity insurance to borrowers. Borrowers are able to extensively use their credit lines in recessions and ahead of credit line cuts. In fact drawdowns and changes in drawdowns predict internal credit rating downgrades and credit line cuts, suggesting substantial liquidity access before credit line cuts. Credit line cuts are concentrated on borrowers who do not use credit lines, and when they occur they still leave borrowers with funds to draw down. Building on this evidence, we develop a model where syndicates faced with liquidity shocks continue to support credit line commitments due to the continuation value of their relationship with borrowers. Our model yields a set of predictions that find support in the data, including the substantial increase in the lead bank's retained loan share and in the commitment fees on the credit lines issued during the financial crisis of 2008-09. Consistent with the model, credit lines with higher expected drawdown rates pay higher commitment fees, and lead banks often increase their credit line investments in response to the failure of syndicate members, reducing borrowers' risk exposure to bank failures.
27701.zh_abstract: 我们提供证据表明信用额度为借款人提供流动性保险。借款人能够在经济衰退期间以及信用额度削减之前广泛使用其信用额度。事实上，提款和提款变化预测了内部信用评级下调和信用额度削减，表明在信用额度削减之前存在显著的流动性获取。信用额度削减集中在不使用信用额度的借款人身上，并且当削减发生时，仍为借款人留下可提取的资金。基于这一证据，我们构建了一个模型，其中面临流动性冲击的银团由于与借款人关系的持续价值而继续支持信用额度承诺。我们的模型产生了一系列在数据中得到支持的预测，包括在2008-09年金融危机期间发行的信用额度中，牵头银行保留的贷款份额和承诺费大幅增加。与模型一致，预期提款率较高的信用额度支付更高的承诺费，并且牵头银行通常通过增加对信用额度的投资来应对银团成员的失败，从而降低借款人对银行失败的风险敞口。

27700.title: Intermediation and Competition in Search Markets: An Empirical Case Study
27700.zh_title: 搜索市场中的中介与竞争：一个实证案例研究
27700.abstract: Intermediaries in decentralized markets can affect buyer welfare both directly, by reducing expenses for buyers with high search cost and indirectly, through a search-externality that affects the prices paid by buyers that do not use intermediaries. I investigate the magnitude of these effects in New York City’s trade-waste market, where buyers can either search by themselves or through a waste broker. Combining elements from the empirical search and procurement-auction literatures, I construct and estimate a model for a decentralized market. Results from the model show that intermediaries improve welfare and benefit buyers in both the broker and the search markets.
27700.zh_abstract: 分散市场中的中介可以通过两种方式影响买方福利：直接地，通过降低高搜索成本买方的费用；间接地，通过影响不使用中介的买方所支付价格的搜索外部性。我研究了纽约市废弃物市场中这些效应的规模，在该市场中，买方可以自行搜索或通过废弃物经纪人搜索。结合实证搜索和采购拍卖文献的要素，我构建并估计了一个分散市场模型。模型结果表明，中介改善了福利，并使经纪市场和搜索市场中的买方都受益。
27700.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D43, D44, L0, L13, L81, L97

27732.title: Repurchase Options in the Market for Lemons
27732.zh_title: 柠檬市场中的回购期权
27732.abstract: We study repurchase options (repo contracts) in a competitive asset market with asymmetric information. Gains from trade emerge from a liquidity need, but private information about asset quality prevents the full realization of trade. We obtain a unique equilibrium, which features a pooling repo contract and full participation among borrowers. The equilibrium repo contract resolves adverse selection: the embedded repurchase option prevents the market unraveling that occurs in asset-sale markets. However, the contract is inefficient due to cream skimming. Competition to attract high-quality borrowers through the terms of the repurchase option inefficiently lowers liquidity. The equilibrium contract has a closed form and is portable to many applications.
27732.zh_abstract: 我们在一个存在信息不对称的竞争性资产市场中研究回购期权（回购合约）。交易收益源于流动性需求，但关于资产质量的私人信息阻碍了交易的完全实现。我们得到了一个唯一均衡，其特征是存在一个混合回购合约以及借款人的完全参与。均衡回购合约解决了逆向选择问题：嵌入的回购期权防止了资产销售市场中出现的市场崩溃。然而，由于撇脂行为，该合约是低效的。通过回购期权条款吸引高质量借款人的竞争会低效地降低流动性。均衡合约具有封闭形式，并可移植到许多应用中。

27731.title: The Stable Transformation Path
27731.authors: Francisco J. Buera, Joseph P. Kaboski, Martí Mestieri, Daniel G. O'Connor
27731.abstract: Dynamic models of structural transformation are often non-stationary, precluding balanced growth path (BGP) analysis. We develop a generalization of the BGP concept that we call a Stable Transformation Path (STraP). The STraP characterizes the medium-term dynamics of the economy in a turnpike sense; it is the non-stationary path toward which the economy (quickly) con- verges from an arbitrary initial capital stock. Calibrated simulations demonstrate that these medium-term dynamics have important quantitative implications for structural transformation, investment, and growth, including slow convergence. Medium-term dynamics alone account for the observed 40% secular decline in average growth rates across stages of development.
27731.zh_abstract: 结构转型的动态模型通常是非平稳的，这阻碍了平衡增长路径分析。我们发展了一个平衡增长路径概念的推广，称之为稳定转型路径。稳定转型路径在高速公路意义上刻画了经济的中期动态；它是经济从任意初始资本存量（快速）收敛到的非平稳路径。校准后的模拟表明，这些中期动态对结构转型、投资和增长具有重要的定量含义，包括缓慢的收敛。仅中期动态就解释了观察到的各发展阶段平均增长率40%的长期下降。
27731.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：O1, O11, O14, O4, O41

27730.title: Coping with H-1B Shortages: Firm Performance and Mitigation Strategies
27730.zh_title: 应对H-1B短缺：企业绩效与缓解策略
27730.authors: Anna Maria Mayda, Francesc Ortega, Giovanni Peri, Kevin Y. Shih, Chad Sparber
27730.abstract: The United States' H-1B visa program, which allows private firms to hire highly skilled foreign workers, was so severely over-subscribed in the years since 2014 that H-1B status was distributed by lotteries to a subset of applicants. Using data on H-1B applications and on a range of outcomes for publicly traded companies, we find that employers using the H-1B program experienced reduced employment, sales and profits, compared to non-users in the years since 2014. We also find that some employers anticipated the rationing of H-1Bs and retained a larger share of H-1B workers, mitigating the damaging effects of H-1B rationing on their performance.
27730.zh_abstract: 美国的H-1B签证计划允许私营企业雇佣高技能外籍工人，自2014年以来该计划严重超额认购，H-1B身份通过抽签方式分配给部分申请人。利用H-1B申请数据以及上市公司的一系列结果数据，我们发现，与未使用该计划的企业相比，自2014年以来使用H-1B计划的企业在就业、销售额和利润方面均出现下降。我们还发现，一些雇主预见到了H-1B的配给限制，并保留了更大比例的H-1B工人，从而减轻了H-1B配给对其绩效的破坏性影响。

27729.title: Income and Poverty in the COVID-19 Pandemic
27729.authors: Jeehoon Han, Bruce D. Meyer, James X. Sullivan
27729.abstract: This paper addresses the economic impact of the COVID-19 pandemic by providing timely and accurate information on the impact of the current pandemic on income and poverty to inform the targeting of resources to those most affected and assess the success of current efforts. We construct new measures of the income distribution and poverty with a lag of only a few weeks using high frequency data from the Basic Monthly Current Population Survey (CPS), which collects income information for a large, representative sample of U.S. families. Because the family income data for this project are rarely used, we validate this timely measure of income by comparing historical estimates that rely on these data to estimates from data on income and consumption that have been used much more broadly. Our results indicate that at the start of the pandemic, government policy effectively countered its effects on incomes, leading poverty to fall and low percentiles of income to rise across a range of demographic groups and geographies. Simulations that rely on the detailed CPS data and that closely match total government payments made show that the entire decline in poverty that we find can be accounted for by the rise in government assistance, including unemployment insurance benefits and the Economic Impact Payments. Our simulations further indicate that of those losing employment the vast majority received unemployment insurance, though this was less true early on in the pandemic and receipt was uneven across the states, with some states not reaching a large share of their out of work residents.\nUpdated information on the summary measures presented in this paper, using the latest data available, may be found at povertymeasurement.org.
27729.zh_abstract: 本文通过提供关于当前疫情对收入和贫困影响的及时准确信息，来评估COVID-19疫情的经济影响，以便将资源精准投向受影响最严重的人群，并评估当前努力的成功程度。我们利用基本月度当前人口调查（CPS）的高频数据，构建了滞后仅数周的收入分配和贫困新指标，该调查收集了大量具有代表性的美国家庭样本的收入信息。由于本项目使用的家庭收入数据很少被采用，我们通过将依赖这些数据的历史估计与更广泛使用的收入和消费数据估计进行比较，验证了这一及时收入指标的有效性。我们的结果表明，在疫情初期，政府政策有效抵消了其对收入的影响，导致贫困率下降，并且在一系列人口群体和地区中，低收入百分位的收入有所上升。基于详细的CPS数据并与政府实际支付总额高度匹配的模拟显示，我们发现的贫困率下降完全可以由政府援助的增加来解释，包括失业保险福利和经济影响支付。我们的模拟进一步表明，在失业人群中，绝大多数人获得了失业保险，尽管这在疫情早期并不完全如此，且各州的领取情况不均衡，一些州未能覆盖其大部分失业居民。关于本文所呈现的汇总指标的最新信息（使用最新可用数据）可在povertymeasurement.org找到。
27729.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：H53, I32, J65

27728.title: Heterogeneous Effects Of Health Insurance On Birth Related Outcomes: Unpacking Compositional Vs. Direct Changes
27728.zh_title: 健康保险对生育相关结果的异质性影响：分解构成变化与直接变化
27728.abstract: When women of childbearing age gain health insurance, we expect their birth outcomes to improve, but comparing births that occur before and after policy changes may confound two separate impacts of coverage. For one, health insurance could affect who gives birth, through reduced costs of contraception. Health insurance could also directly improve maternal and child health among those who give birth, through additional prenatal resources. We address this question using the Affordable Care Act young adult provision, comparing birth related outcomes for those aged 24-25 years after the law, to outcomes among older young adults. We show that since the law subsidized contraceptives mainly among higher socioeconomic groups, the composition of mothers shifted towards less advantaged groups. Accounting for this shift, we find evidence of direct improvements in prenatal care and pregnancy-related health (reduced gestational diabetes and hypertension).
27728.zh_abstract: 当育龄女性获得健康保险时，我们预期她们的生育结果会改善，但比较政策变化前后发生的生育可能会混淆保险覆盖的两种不同影响。一方面，健康保险可能通过降低避孕成本来影响谁选择生育。另一方面，健康保险也可能通过增加产前资源，直接改善已生育女性的母婴健康。我们利用《平价医疗法案》的年轻成人条款来解决这个问题，比较该法案实施后24-25岁人群与较年长年轻成人的生育相关结果。我们表明，由于该法案主要补贴了较高社会经济群体的避孕措施，母亲构成转向了更弱势的群体。在考虑这一构成变化后，我们发现了产前护理和妊娠相关健康（妊娠期糖尿病和高血压减少）得到直接改善的证据。

27727.title: Dynamic Trade-offs and Labor Supply Under the CARES Act
27727.zh_title: 《CARES法案》下的动态权衡与劳动力供给
27727.abstract: The CARES Act resulted in many unemployed workers receiving benefits that exceeded wages at their previous job. Given this, would an unemployed worker reject an offer to return to their former job at the same wage? Qualitatively, we provide a very simple dynamic model that incorporates four reasons the answer could be ‘no’: (i) the temporary nature of the CARES Act, (ii) uncertainty that their return-to-work offer might expire, (iii) search frictions, and (iv) wage losses out of unemployment in a recession. Quantitatively, when evaluated under empirically relevant parameters, we find it unlikely a worker would reject an offer to return to work at the same wage. We show special cases where this is not true and relate these to anecdotal evidence.
27727.zh_abstract: 《CARES法案》导致许多失业工人获得的福利超过了他们之前工作的工资。鉴于此，失业工人是否会拒绝以相同工资重返原工作岗位的提议？从定性角度，我们提供了一个非常简单的动态模型，其中包含了答案可能是“否”的四个原因：（i）《CARES法案》的临时性，（ii）重返工作岗位的提议可能失效的不确定性，（iii）搜索摩擦，以及（iv）经济衰退期间失业导致的工资损失。从定量角度，当在经验相关参数下进行评估时，我们发现工人不太可能拒绝以相同工资重返工作岗位的提议。我们展示了这不成立的特殊情况，并将其与轶事证据联系起来。

27726.title: Increasing Hours Worked: Moonlighting Responses to a Large Tax Reform
27726.zh_title: 增加工作时间：对大规模税收改革的兼职反应
27726.abstract: Moonlighting is increasingly popular in OECD countries, with 5 to 10% of workers holding two or more jobs. However, little is known about the responsiveness of moonlighting to financial incentives due to the lack of identifying variation. This paper studies a unique reform in Germany that allowed workers to hold small secondary jobs tax-free, decreasing the marginal tax rate by between 19.5 to 66pp. I show that the reform resulted in a dramatic increase in moonlighting that was not offset by reductions in primary earnings, and that hours constraints is the key determinant of moonlighting.
27726.zh_abstract: 在OECD国家，兼职现象日益普遍，5%至10%的工人拥有两份或更多工作。然而，由于缺乏识别性变化，关于兼职对财务激励的反应程度知之甚少。本文研究了德国一项独特的改革，该改革允许工人免税从事小型副业，将边际税率降低了19.5至66个百分点。我表明，这项改革导致了兼职活动的急剧增加，且并未被主要收入的减少所抵消，而工作时间限制是决定兼职的关键因素。

27725.title: Gender and Culture
27725.abstract: This paper reviews the literature on gender and culture. Gender gaps in various outcomes (competitiveness, labor force participation, and performance in mathematics, amongst many others) show remarkable differences across countries and tend to persist over time. The economics literature initially explained these differences by looking at standard economic variables such as the level of development, women’s education, the expansion of the service sector, and discrimination. More recent literature has argued that gender differences in a variety of outcomes could reflect underlying cultural values and beliefs. This article reviews the literature on the relevance of culture in the determination of different forms of gender gap. I examine how differences in historical situations could have been relevant in generating gender differences and the conditions under which gender norms tend to be stable or to change over time, emphasizing the role of social learning. Finally, I review the role of different forms of cultural transmission in shaping gender differences, distinguishing between channels of vertical transmission (the role of the family), horizontal transmission (the role of peers), and oblique transmission (the role of teachers or role models).
27725.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于性别与文化的文献。各种结果（如竞争力、劳动力参与率和数学表现等）中的性别差距在不同国家之间表现出显著差异，并且往往随时间持续存在。经济学文献最初通过考察标准经济变量（如发展水平、女性教育、服务业的扩张和歧视）来解释这些差异。最近的文献则认为，各种结果中的性别差异可能反映了潜在的文化价值观和信念。本文回顾了关于文化在决定不同形式性别差距中相关性的文献。我考察了历史情境的差异如何可能在产生性别差异方面具有相关性，以及性别规范在何种条件下趋于稳定或随时间变化，强调了社会学习的作用。最后，我回顾了不同形式的文化传播在塑造性别差异中的作用，区分了垂直传播（家庭的作用）、水平传播（同伴的作用）和斜向传播（教师或榜样的作用）渠道。

27724.title: On Socializing and Social Distancing in Markets: Implications for Retail Prices, Store-level Consumer Density, and Disease Transmission
27724.zh_title: 论市场中的社交与社交距离：对零售价格、门店层面消费者密度和疾病传播的影响
27724.abstract: I generalize the "noisy search" model of Burdett and Judd (1983) to settings where individual buyers have preferences over the number of other buyers who visit the same seller as them. I consider a version in which buyers have a preference for social distancing derived from the risk of contracting a disease from other buyers, and use it to study the two-way equilibrium interaction between supply-side considerations (such as the distribution of prices posted by sellers) and individual buyers' behavioral responses to the risk of contagion. I find that the price response to the buyers' shift toward social distancing can be an important determinant of the degree to which buyers' individual behavioral responses to the risk of contagion can mitigate the spread of the disease.
27724.zh_abstract: 我将Burdett和Judd（1983）的“噪声搜索”模型推广到个体买家对访问同一卖家的其他买家数量有偏好的情境。我考虑了一个版本，其中买家因从其他买家那里感染疾病的风险而产生对社交距离的偏好，并利用它来研究供给侧因素（如卖家发布的价格分布）与个体买家对传染风险的行为反应之间的双向均衡互动。我发现，价格对买家转向社交距离行为的反应，可能是决定买家个体对传染风险的行为反应能在多大程度上缓解疾病传播的重要因素。

27723.title: Data-intensive Innovation and the State: Evidence from AI Firms in China
27723.zh_title: 数据密集型创新与国家：来自中国人工智能企业的证据
27723.authors: Martin Beraja, David Y. Yang, Noam Yuchtman
27723.abstract: Developing AI technology requires data. In many domains, government data far exceeds in magnitude and scope data collected by the private sector, and AI firms often gain access to such data when providing services to the state. We argue that such access can stimulate commercial AI innovation in part because data and trained algorithms are shareable across government and commercial uses. We gather comprehensive information on firms and public security procurement contracts in China’s facial recognition AI industry. We quantify the data accessible through contracts by measuring public security agencies’ capacity to collect surveillance video. Using a triple-differences strategy, we find that data-rich contracts, compared to data-scarce ones, lead recipient firms to develop significantly and substantially more commercial AI software. Our analysis indicates a contribution of government data to the rise of China’s facial recognition AI firms, and suggests that states’ data collection and provision policies could shape AI innovation.
27723.zh_abstract: 开发人工智能技术需要数据。在许多领域，政府数据在规模和范围上远远超过私营部门收集的数据，人工智能企业在向国家提供服务时通常可以获得这些数据。我们认为，这种访问可以刺激商业人工智能创新，部分原因是数据和训练好的算法可以在政府用途和商业用途之间共享。我们收集了中国面部识别人工智能行业中企业和公共安全采购合同的全面信息。我们通过衡量公共安全机构收集监控视频的能力来量化通过合同可访问的数据。使用三重差分策略，我们发现，与数据稀缺的合同相比，数据丰富的合同使接收企业开发出显著且大量的商业人工智能软件。我们的分析表明，政府数据对中国面部识别人工智能企业的崛起有所贡献，并暗示国家的数据收集和提供政策可能塑造人工智能创新。
27723.meta: Programs：EFG, POL, PR；JEL：E0, H4, L5, L63, O25, O30, O40, P00, P16, Z21

27722.title: When Tariffs Disturb Global Supply Chains
27722.zh_title: 当关税扰乱全球供应链时
27722.abstract: We study unanticipated tariffs on imports of intermediate goods in a setting with firm-to-firm supply relationships. Firms that produce differentiated products conduct costly searches for potential input suppliers and negotiate bilateral prices with those that pass a reservation level of match productivity. Global supply chains are formed in anticipation of free trade. Once they are in place, the home government surprises with an input tariff. This can lead to renegotiation with initial suppliers or new search for replacements. We identify circumstances in which renegotiation generates improvement or deterioration in the terms of trade. The welfare implications of a tariff are ambiguous in this second-best setting, but plausible parameter values suggest a welfare loss that rises rapidly at high tariff rates.
27722.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在企业间供应关系背景下，对中间产品进口征收的意外关税。生产差异化产品的企业会为潜在投入品供应商进行成本高昂的搜寻，并与那些通过匹配生产率保留水平的供应商谈判双边价格。全球供应链是在预期自由贸易的情况下形成的。一旦这些供应链建立起来，本国政府会出人意料地征收投入品关税。这可能导致与初始供应商重新谈判，或者寻找替代供应商进行新的搜寻。我们识别出重新谈判会导致贸易条件改善或恶化的情况。在这种次优环境中，关税的福利影响是不明确的，但合理的参数值表明，在高关税税率下福利损失会迅速增加。

27721.title: Interbank Networks in the Shadows of the Federal Reserve Act
27721.zh_title: 《联邦储备法案》阴影下的银行间网络
27721.authors: Haelim Anderson, Selman Erol, Guillermo Ordoñez
27721.abstract: Central banks provide public liquidity to traditional (regulated) banks with the intention of stabilizing the financial system. Shadow banks are not regulated, yet they indirectly access such liquidity through the interbank system. We build a model that shows how public liquidity provision may change the linkages between traditional and shadow banks, increasing systemic risk through three channels: reducing aggregate liquidity, expanding fragile short-term borrowing, and crowding out of private cross-bank insurance. We show that the creation of the Federal Reserve System and the provision of public liquidity changed the structure and nature of the U.S. interbank network in ways that are consistent with the model and its implications. We provide empirical evidence by constructing unique data on balance sheets and detailed disaggregated information on payments and funding connections in Virginia.
27721.zh_abstract: 中央银行向传统（受监管）银行提供公共流动性，旨在稳定金融体系。影子银行不受监管，但它们通过银行间系统间接获取此类流动性。我们构建了一个模型，展示了公共流动性供给如何可能改变传统银行与影子银行之间的联系，并通过三个渠道增加系统性风险：减少总体流动性、扩大脆弱的短期借款、挤出私人银行间保险。我们表明，美国联邦储备系统的建立以及公共流动性的供给，改变了美国银行间网络的结构和性质，其方式与模型及其含义一致。我们通过构建弗吉尼亚州独特的资产负债表数据以及关于支付和融资联系的详细分类信息，提供了实证证据。
27721.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D53, D85, E02, E44, G11, G21, G23, N21

27720.title: Now Unions Increase Job Satisfaction and Well-being
27720.zh_title: 如今工会能提高工作满意度和幸福感
27720.abstract: Using data from the United States and Europe on nearly two million respondents we show the partial correlation between union membership and employee job satisfaction is positive and statistically significant. This runs counter to findings in the seminal work of Freeman (1978) and Borjas (1979) in the 1970s and most empirical studies since. With data for the United States we show the association between union membership and job satisfaction switched from negative to positive in the 2000s. Cohorts with positive union effects over time come to dominate those with negative effects. The negative association between membership and job satisfaction is apparent in cohorts born in the 1940s and 1950s but turns positive for those born between the 1960s and 1990s. Analyses for Europe since the 2000s confirm the positive association between union membership and worker wellbeing is apparent elsewhere. We also find evidence in the United Kingdom from panel estimation of a positive relation between union membership and job satisfaction. We find positive union associations with other aspects of worker wellbeing including life satisfaction and happiness, several macro variables and various measures of trust. Union members are also less likely to be stressed, worried, depressed, sad or lonely. The findings have important implications for our understanding of trade unionism.
27720.zh_abstract: 利用美国和欧洲近两百万受访者的数据，我们发现工会成员身份与员工工作满意度之间的偏相关系数为正且统计显著。这与弗里曼（1978）和博尔哈斯（1979）在20世纪70年代的开创性研究以及此后大多数实证研究的发现相反。利用美国的数据，我们显示工会成员身份与工作满意度之间的关联在21世纪从负相关转变为正相关。随着时间的推移，具有正向工会效应的群体逐渐主导了具有负向效应的群体。工会成员身份与工作满意度之间的负相关在20世纪40年代和50年代出生的人群中明显，但在20世纪60年代至90年代出生的人群中转为正相关。对21世纪以来欧洲的分析证实，工会成员身份与工人幸福感之间的正相关在其他地方也很明显。我们还从英国的面板估计中发现了工会成员身份与工作满意度之间正相关的证据。我们发现工会与工人幸福感的其他方面存在正相关，包括生活满意度和幸福感、若干宏观变量以及各种信任指标。工会成员也不太可能感到压力、担忧、沮丧、悲伤或孤独。这些发现对我们理解工会主义具有重要意义。

27719.title: Four Stylized Facts about COVID-19
27719.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Karen Kopecky, Tao Zha
27719.abstract: We document four facts about the COVID-19 pandemic worldwide relevant for those studying the impact of non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs) on COVID-19 transmission. First: across all countries and U.S. states that we study, the growth rates of daily deaths from COVID-19 fell from a wide range of initially high levels to levels close to zero within 20-30 days after each region experienced 25 cumulative deaths. Second: after this initial period, growth rates of daily deaths have hovered around zero or below everywhere in the world. Third: the cross section standard deviation of growth rates of daily deaths across locations fell very rapidly in the first 10 days of the epidemic and has remained at a relatively low level since then. Fourth: when interpreted through a range of epidemiological models, these first three facts about the growth rate of COVID deaths imply that both the effective reproduction numbers and transmission rates of COVID-19 fell from widely dispersed initial levels and the effective reproduction number has hovered around one after the first 30 days of the epidemic virtually everywhere in the world. We argue that failing to account for these four stylized facts may result in overstating the importance of policy mandated NPIs for shaping the progression of this deadly pandemic.
27719.zh_abstract: 我们记录了全球COVID-19大流行的四个事实，这些事实对于研究非药物干预措施（NPI）对COVID-19传播影响的人士具有相关性。第一：在我们研究的所有国家和美国各州中，在每个地区累计死亡人数达到25人后的20-30天内，COVID-19每日死亡人数的增长率从最初广泛的高水平下降到接近零的水平。第二：在这个初始阶段之后，世界各地每日死亡人数的增长率一直徘徊在零附近或低于零。第三：不同地点每日死亡人数增长率的横截面标准差在疫情最初10天内下降得非常迅速，此后一直保持在相对较低的水平。第四：当通过一系列流行病学模型进行解释时，关于COVID-19死亡增长率的这三个事实意味着，COVID-19的有效再生数和传播率都从广泛分散的初始水平下降，并且在疫情最初30天后，有效再生数几乎在世界各地都徘徊在1左右。我们认为，未能考虑这四个典型事实可能会导致高估政策强制实施的NPI在塑造这场致命大流行进程中的重要性。
27719.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, PE；JEL：C01, C02, C11, I1

27718.title: The Economic Impact of Migrants from Hurricane Maria
27718.zh_title: 飓风玛丽亚移民的经济影响
27718.authors: Giovanni Peri, Derek Rury, Justin C. Wiltshire
27718.abstract: We examine the economic impact of the large migration of Puerto Ricans to Orlando after Hurricane Maria. Using a synthetic control approach, we find that employment in Orlando increased, especially in construction and retail, and find positive aggregate labor market effects for non-Hispanic and less-educated workers. While we find that earnings for these workers decreased slightly in construction, this was balanced by earnings growth in retail and hospitality. These results are consistent with small negative impacts on earnings in sectors exposed to a labor supply shock, offset by positive effects in sectors impacted by an associated positive consumer demand shock.
27718.zh_abstract: 我们研究了飓风玛丽亚后波多黎各人大规模迁移到奥兰多的经济影响。使用合成控制方法，我们发现奥兰多的就业增加了，尤其是在建筑业和零售业，并且发现对非西班牙裔和受教育程度较低的工人产生了积极的总体劳动力市场效应。虽然我们发现这些工人在建筑业的收入略有下降，但这被零售和酒店业的收入增长所抵消。这些结果与以下情况一致：在受到劳动力供给冲击的部门，收入受到轻微的负面影响，而在受到相关正向消费需求冲击影响的部门，收入则受到正面影响。

27717.title: The EITC and Maternal Time Use: More Time Working and Less Time with Kids?
27717.zh_title: 劳动所得税抵免与母亲的时间使用：更多时间工作，更少时间陪伴孩子？
27717.abstract: Parents spend considerable sums investing in their children's development, with their own time among the most important forms of investment. Given well-documented effects of the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) on maternal labor supply, it is natural to ask how the EITC affects other time allocation decisions, especially time with children. We use the American Time Use Surveys to study the effects of EITC expansions since 2003 on time devoted to a broad array of activities, with considerable attention to the amount and nature of time spent with children. Our results confirm prior evidence that the EITC increases maternal work and reduces time devoted to home production and leisure, especially among unmarried women. More novel, we show that the EITC also reduces time spent with children; however, almost none of this reduction comes from time devoted to active investment-related activities that are most likely to foster child development.
27717.zh_abstract: 父母投入大量资金用于子女的发展，其中他们自己的时间是最重要的投资形式之一。鉴于劳动所得税抵免（EITC）对母亲劳动力供给的显著影响，很自然地要问EITC如何影响其他时间分配决策，尤其是与孩子相处的时间。我们使用美国时间使用调查来研究自2003年以来EITC扩张对广泛活动时间投入的影响，并特别关注与孩子相处的时间数量和质量。我们的结果证实了先前的证据，即EITC增加了母亲的工作时间，减少了用于家庭生产和休闲的时间，尤其是在未婚女性中。更值得注意的是，我们表明EITC也减少了与孩子相处的时间；然而，这些减少几乎都不是来自最有可能促进儿童发展的积极投资相关活动的时间。
27717.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：D13, H24, H31, H53, I31, I38, J13, J22

27716.title: Openness to Trade and the Spread of Industrialization: Evidence from Canada during the First Era of Globalization
27716.zh_title: 贸易开放与工业化的传播：来自第一次全球化时期加拿大的证据
27716.abstract: We use new data on manufacturing in Canada to quantify the impact of globalization on the growth and composition of industrialization in the second half of the nineteenth century. We find that industries and regions more exposed to international trade experienced faster growth. Consistent with the literature on economic development in Canada, we find that scale economies, government policy decisions, and domestic market expansion also played an important role in manufacturing growth. However, after controlling for these factors, we find that greater exposure to globalization shaped the pattern of regional industrialization in a way not appreciated in Canadian historiography.
27716.zh_abstract: 我们利用加拿大制造业的新数据，量化了19世纪下半叶全球化对工业化增长和构成的影响。我们发现，更易受国际贸易影响的行业和地区经历了更快的增长。与关于加拿大经济发展的文献一致，我们发现规模经济、政府政策决策和国内市场扩张也在制造业增长中发挥了重要作用。然而，在控制了这些因素之后，我们发现，更大的全球化暴露程度以加拿大史学界未曾认识到的方式塑造了区域工业化的模式。

27715.title: Estimating DSGE Models: Recent Advances and Future Challenges
27715.zh_title: 估计DSGE模型：近期进展与未来挑战
27715.abstract: We review the current state of the estimation of DSGE models. After introducing a general framework for dealing with DSGE models, the state-space representation, we discuss how to evaluate moments or the likelihood function implied by such a structure. We discuss, in varying degrees of detail, recent advances in the field, such as the tempered particle filter, approximated Bayesian computation, the Hamiltonian Monte Carlo, variational inference, and machine learning, methods that show much promise, but that have not been fully explored yet by the DSGE community. We conclude by outlining three future challenges for this line of research.
27715.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了DSGE模型估计的当前状态。在介绍了处理DSGE模型的一般框架（状态空间表示）之后，我们讨论了如何评估由这种结构隐含的矩或似然函数。我们以不同程度的细节讨论了该领域的最新进展，例如缓和粒子滤波、近似贝叶斯计算、哈密顿蒙特卡洛、变分推断和机器学习，这些方法显示出很大的前景，但尚未被DSGE学界充分探索。最后，我们概述了这一研究方向的三个未来挑战。

27714.title: Have Income-Based Achievement Gaps Widened or Narrowed?
27714.zh_title: 基于收入的成就差距是扩大还是缩小了？
27714.authors: Shirin A. Hashim, Thomas J. Kane, Thomas Kelley-Kemple, Mary E. Laski, Douglas O. Staiger
27714.abstract: Over the past 30 years, rising income inequality and income-based residential segregation have threatened to widen income-based achievement gaps. Yet, there are no national data which combine a consistent measure of parental income and achievement for individual students to measure those gaps over time. We take two alternative approaches to inferring income-based achievement gaps: First, we reconstruct the student-level relationship using school-level estimates of means and variances of achievement and income. Second, we combine estimates of mean income by race, mother’s education, urbanicity and state with mean achievement for the corresponding subgroups on a national assessment. Using both methods, we find that income-based achievement gaps in 4th and 8th grade narrowed between 1992 and 2015—while math scores rose at all income levels.
27714.zh_abstract: 过去30年间，收入不平等和基于收入的居住隔离加剧，可能扩大基于收入的成就差距。然而，目前缺乏全国性数据，能够将学生个体层面一致的父母收入衡量指标与成就衡量指标结合起来，以衡量这些差距随时间的变化。我们采用两种替代方法来推断基于收入的成就差距：首先，利用学校层面的平均收入和成就估计值及其方差，重建学生层面的关系。其次，将按种族、母亲教育程度、城乡类型和州划分的平均收入估计值，与全国评估中相应子群体的平均成就估计值相结合。使用这两种方法，我们发现，1992年至2015年间，四年级和八年级基于收入的成就差距有所缩小——而所有收入水平的数学成绩均有所上升。

27713.title: Judge Peer Effects in the Courthouse
27713.zh_title: 法院中的法官同伴效应
27713.abstract: We investigate whether consequential decisions made by judges are impacted by observable characteristics of peer judges. We utilize the universe of decisions on juvenile defendants in each courthouse in a Southern state over fifteen years. Leveraging random assignment of cases to judges, and variations in judge peer composition generated by judicial turnover, we show that an increase in the proportion of female peers in the courthouse causes a rise in individual judges’ propensity to incarcerate, and an increase in prison time. This effect is driven by female judges. Further analysis suggests that this behavior of female judges is likely due to the sheer exposure to female colleagues.
27713.zh_abstract: 我们研究法官做出的重要决定是否受到同伴法官可观测特征的影响。我们利用美国南部某州每个法院十五年内所有青少年被告案件的数据。借助案件随机分配给法官，以及因法官更替产生的同伴构成变化，我们发现，法院中女性同伴比例的增加会导致个别法官监禁倾向上升，且刑期延长。这种效应由女性法官驱动。进一步分析表明，女性法官的这种行为很可能仅仅是由于接触女性同事所致。
27713.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D9, D91, J16, J71, K4, K41

27712.title: Monetary Policy and Asset Price Overshooting: A Rationale for the Wall/Main Street Disconnect
27712.zh_title: 货币政策与资产价格过度反应：华尔街与主街脱节的解释
27712.abstract: We analyze optimal monetary policy and its implications for asset prices, when aggregate demand has inertia and responds to asset prices with a lag. If there is a negative output gap, the central bank optimally overshoots aggregate asset prices (asset prices are initially pushed above their steady-state levels consistent with current potential output). Overshooting leads to a temporary disconnect between the performance of financial markets and the real economy, but accelerates the recovery. When there is a lower-bound constraint on the discount rate, overshooting becomes a concave and non-monotonic function of the output gap: the asset price boost is low for a deeply negative initial output gap, grows as the output gap improves over a range, and shrinks toward zero as the output gap improves further. This pattern also implies that good macroeconomic news is better news for asset prices when the output gap is more negative. Finally, we document that during the Covid-19 recovery, the policy-induced overshooting was large—sufficient to explain the high levels of stock and house prices in 2021.
27712.zh_abstract: 我们分析了当总需求具有惯性且对资产价格的反应存在滞后时，最优货币政策及其对资产价格的影响。如果存在负产出缺口，中央银行会最优地使总体资产价格过度反应（资产价格最初被推高至与当前潜在产出一致的稳态水平之上）。过度反应导致金融市场表现与实体经济暂时脱节，但加速了经济复苏。当贴现率存在下限约束时，过度反应成为产出缺口的凹函数且非单调：对于深度负值的初始产出缺口，资产价格提振幅度较小；随着产出缺口在一定范围内改善，提振幅度增大；当产出缺口进一步改善时，提振幅度缩小至零。这一模式还意味着，当产出缺口更负时，良好的宏观经济消息对资产价格而言是更好的消息。最后，我们记录到，在新冠疫情复苏期间，政策引发的过度反应规模很大——足以解释2021年股票和房价的高水平。
27712.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E21, E32, E43, E44, E52, G12

27711.title: What Good Are Treatment Effects without Treatment? Mental Health and the Reluctance to Use Talk Therapy
27711.zh_title: 没有治疗的治疗效果有何用？心理健康与谈话疗法使用意愿不足
27711.authors: Christopher J. Cronin, Matthew P. Forsstrom, Nicholas W. Papageorge
27711.abstract: Evidence across disciplines suggests that talk therapy is more curative than antidepressants for mild-to-moderate depression and anxiety. Yet, few patients use it. We develop a dynamic choice model to analyze patient demand for the treatment of depression and anxiety. The model incorporates myriad potential impediments to therapy use along with links between mental health improvements and earnings. The estimated model reveals that mental health improvements are valuable, directly through utility and indirectly through earnings. However, patient reluctance to use therapy is nearly impervious to reasonable counterfactual policies (e.g., lowering prices or removing other costs). Patient behavior might reflect stigma, biases in beliefs about the effectiveness of therapy, or a distaste for discussing personal or painful issues with a stranger. More broadly, the benefits of therapy estimated in randomized trials tell only half the story. If patients do not use treatments outside of an experimental setting—and we fail to understand why or how to get them to—estimated treatment effects cannot be leveraged.
27711.zh_abstract: 跨学科证据表明，对于轻中度抑郁和焦虑，谈话疗法比抗抑郁药更具治愈效果。然而，很少有患者使用它。我们开发了一个动态选择模型来分析患者对抑郁和焦虑治疗的需求。该模型纳入了众多可能阻碍治疗使用的因素，以及心理健康改善与收入之间的联系。估计模型显示，心理健康改善是有价值的，既直接通过效用，也间接通过收入。然而，患者对使用疗法的抵触情绪几乎不受合理的反事实政策（例如降低价格或消除其他成本）的影响。患者行为可能反映了污名化、对疗法有效性的信念偏差，或不愿与陌生人讨论个人或痛苦问题。更广泛地说，随机试验中估计的疗法益处只讲述了故事的一半。如果患者在实验环境之外不使用治疗——而我们又不理解原因或如何促使他们使用——那么估计的治疗效果就无法被利用。

27710.title: Exit vs. Voice
27710.authors: Eleonora Broccardo, Oliver D. Hart, Luigi Zingales
27710.abstract: We study the relative effectiveness of exit (divestment and boycott) and voice (engagement) strategies in promoting socially desirable outcomes in companies. We show that in a competitive world exit is less effective than voice in pushing firms to act in a socially responsible manner. Furthermore, we demonstrate that individual incentives to join an exit strategy are not necessarily aligned with social incentives, whereas they are when well-diversified investors are allowed to express their voice. We discuss what social and legal considerations might sometimes make exit preferable to voice.
27710.zh_abstract: 我们研究了退出（撤资和抵制）与发声（参与）策略在促进公司追求社会合意结果方面的相对有效性。我们表明，在竞争性世界中，退出在推动企业以社会责任方式行事方面不如发声有效。此外，我们证明，个人加入退出策略的激励不一定与社会激励一致，而当充分多元化的投资者被允许表达其发声时，两者则是一致的。我们讨论了哪些社会和法律考量有时可能使退出比发声更可取。
27710.meta: Programs：CF, LE；JEL：D02, D21, D23, D62, D64, H41, L21

27709.title: Permanent Income Shocks, Target Wealth, and the Wealth Gap
27709.zh_title: 永久性收入冲击、目标财富与财富差距
27709.abstract: We test the key implication of the buffer stock model, namely that any revision in permanent income leads to a proportionate revision in target wealth. We use panel data on the amount of wealth held for precautionary purposes available in the 2002-2016 SHIW. Using an instrumental variable approach to overcome measurement error issues and direct estimates of the permanent component of income, we find that households indeed revise approximately one-for-one their target wealth in response to permanent income shocks. We explore heterogeneity of the response across the cash-on-hand distribution, for positive and negative shocks, and for shocks of different size. We also find that the change in the ratio of cash-on-hand to permanent income is negatively correlated with the “wealth gap”, particularly for individuals whose wealth is substantially above target.
27709.zh_abstract: 我们检验了缓冲库存模型的关键含义，即永久性收入的任何修正都会导致目标财富的成比例修正。我们使用了2002-2016年意大利家庭收入和财富调查（SHIW）中关于为预防目的而持有的财富金额的面板数据。采用工具变量方法克服测量误差问题，并直接估计收入的永久性成分，我们发现，家庭确实会根据永久性收入冲击大致一对一地修正其目标财富。我们探讨了这种反应在现金持有量分布、正向与负向冲击以及不同规模冲击下的异质性。我们还发现，现金持有量与永久性收入之比的变化与“财富差距”呈负相关，特别是对于那些财富大幅高于目标的个体。

27708.title: The Baker Hypothesis
27708.authors: Anusha Chari, Peter Blair Henry, Hector Reyes
27708.abstract: In 1985, James A. Baker III's “Program for Sustained Growth” proposed a set of economic policy reforms including, inflation stabilization, trade liberalization, greater openness to foreign investment, and privatization, that he believed would lead to faster growth in countries then known as the Third World, but now categorized as emerging and developing economies (EMDEs). A country-specific, time-series assessment of the reform process reveals three clear facts. First, in the 10-year-period after stabilizing high inflation, the average growth rate of real GDP in EMDEs is 2.2 percentage points higher than in the prior ten-year period. Second, the corresponding growth increase for trade liberalization episodes is 2.66 percentage points. Third, in the decade after opening their capital markets to foreign equity investment, the spread between EMDEs average cost of equity capital and that of the US declines by 240 basis points. The impact of privatization is less straightforward to assess, but taken together, the three central facts of reform provide empirical support for the Baker Hypothesis and suggest a simple neoclassical interpretation of the unprecedented increase in growth that has taken place in EMDEs since 1995.
27708.zh_abstract: 1985年，詹姆斯·A·贝克三世提出的“持续增长计划”建议了一套经济政策改革，包括稳定通胀、贸易自由化、对外国投资更加开放以及私有化。他认为这些改革将促进当时被称为第三世界、现在归类为新兴和发展中经济体（EMDEs）的国家实现更快增长。对改革进程进行的国别时间序列评估揭示了三个明确的事实。首先，在稳定高通胀后的十年内，EMDEs的实际GDP平均增长率比前十年高出2.2个百分点。其次，贸易自由化事件对应的增长提升为2.66个百分点。第三，在向外国股权投资开放资本市场后的十年内，EMDEs的平均股权资本成本与美国之间的利差下降了240个基点。私有化的影响较难评估，但综合来看，改革的这三个核心事实为贝克假说提供了实证支持，并暗示了自1995年以来EMDEs所经历的前所未有增长的一种简单新古典解释。
27708.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E13, E44, F21, F43, F6, F63, O1, O38, O47

27763.title: Monetary Stimulus Amidst the Infrastructure Investment Spree: Evidence from China's Loan-Level Data
27763.zh_title: 基础设施投资热潮中的货币刺激：来自中国贷款层面数据的证据
27763.authors: Kaiji Chen, Haoyu Gao, Patrick C. Higgins, Daniel F. Waggoner, Tao Zha
27763.abstract: We study how a fiscal expansion via infrastructure investment influences the dynamic impacts of monetary stimulus on credit allocation. We develop a two-stage approach and apply it to the Chinese economy with a confidential loan-level dataset that covers all sectors. We find that infrastructure investment significantly weakened monetary policy's transmission to credit allocated to private firms, while reinforcing the monetary effects on loans to state-owned firms. This fiscal-monetary interaction channel is key to understanding the preferential credit access enjoyed by state-owned firms during the stimulus period. Consequently, monetary stimulus crowded out private investment and lowered efficiency in capital allocation.
27763.zh_abstract: 我们研究了通过基础设施投资进行的财政扩张如何影响货币刺激对信贷配置的动态效应。我们开发了一种两阶段方法，并将其应用于涵盖所有部门的机密贷款层面数据集中的中国经济。我们发现，基础设施投资显著削弱了货币政策向私营企业信贷的传导，同时强化了货币政策对国有企业贷款的影响。这种财政-货币互动渠道是理解刺激期间国有企业享有优惠信贷准入的关键。因此，货币刺激挤出了私人投资并降低了资本配置效率。

27762.title: What Difference Does a Health Plan Make? Evidence from Random Plan Assignment in Medicaid
27762.zh_title: 健康计划能带来什么不同？来自医疗补助计划随机分配的证据
27762.authors: Michael Geruso, Timothy J. Layton, Jacob Wallace
27762.abstract: Exploiting the random assignment of Medicaid beneficiaries to managed care plans, we find substantial plan-specific spending effects despite plans having identical cost sharing. Enrollment in the lowest-spending plan generates 30% lower spending—driven by differences in quantity—relative to enrollment in the highest-spending plan. Rather than reducing “wasteful” spending, lower-spending plans broadly reduce medical service provision—including the provision of low-cost, high-value care—and worsen beneficiary satisfaction and health. Consumer demand follows spending: a 10 percent increase in plan-specific spending is associated with a 40 percent increase in market share. These facts have implications for the government’s contracting problem and program cost growth.
27762.zh_abstract: 利用医疗补助受益人随机分配到管理式护理计划的情况，我们发现尽管计划具有相同的成本分摊，但存在显著的特定计划支出效应。与最高支出计划相比，最低支出计划的参保者支出降低了30%——这由数量差异驱动。较低支出计划并非减少“浪费性”支出，而是普遍减少医疗服务提供——包括低成本、高价值护理的提供——并降低了受益人满意度和健康状况。消费者需求跟随支出：特定计划支出每增加10%，市场份额增加40%。这些事实对政府的合同问题及项目成本增长具有启示意义。

27761.title: Racial Disparities in Motor Vehicle Searches Cannot Be Justified by Efficiency
27761.zh_title: 机动车搜查中的种族差异不能以效率为由合理化
27761.abstract: During traffic stops, police search black and Hispanic motorists more often than white motorists, yet those searches are equally or less likely to yield contraband. We ask whether equalizing search rates by motorist race would reduce contraband yield. We use unique administrative data from Texas to isolate variation in search behavior across highway patrol troopers and find that, across troopers, search rates are unrelated to the proportion of searches that yield contraband. Our results imply that, in partial equilibrium, troopers can equalize search rates across racial groups, maintain the status quo search rate, and increase contraband yield.
27761.zh_abstract: 在交通拦截中，警察搜查黑人和西班牙裔驾驶者的频率高于白人驾驶者，但这些搜查发现违禁品的可能性相同或更低。我们探讨按驾驶者种族平等化搜查率是否会降低违禁品发现率。我们使用来自德克萨斯州的独特行政数据来隔离高速公路巡警搜查行为的变化，并发现，在不同巡警之间，搜查率与发现违禁品的搜查比例无关。我们的结果表明，在局部均衡中，巡警可以在维持现状搜查率的同时，按种族群体平等化搜查率，并提高违禁品发现率。

27760.title: What Can Economics Say About Alzheimer's Disease?
27760.zh_title: 经济学对阿尔茨海默病能说些什么？
27760.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Courtney Coile, Corina Mommaerts
27760.abstract: Alzheimer’s Disease (AD) affects one in ten people aged 65 or older and is the most expensive disease in the United States. We describe the central economic questions raised by AD. Although there is overlap with the economics of aging and health, the defining feature of the “economics of Alzheimer’s Disease” is an emphasis on choice by cognitively impaired patients that affects health and financial well-being, and situations in which dynamic contracts between patients and caregivers are useful but difficult to enforce. A focus on innovation in AD prevention, treatment, and care is also critical given the enormous social cost of AD and present lack of understanding of its causes, which raises questions of optimal resource allocation and alignment of private and social incentives. The enormous scope for economists to contribute to our understanding of AD-related issues including drug development, efficient care delivery, dynamic contracting, long-term care risk, financial decision-making, and the design of public programs for AD suggests a rich research program for many areas of economics.
27760.zh_abstract: 阿尔茨海默病影响每十名65岁或以上老年人中的一人，并且是美国最昂贵的疾病。我们描述了阿尔茨海默病引发的核心经济问题。尽管与老龄化和健康经济学存在重叠，但“阿尔茨海默病经济学”的定义特征在于强调认知受损患者的选择如何影响健康和财务福祉，以及患者与照护者之间的动态契约有用但难以执行的情况。鉴于阿尔茨海默病的巨大社会成本以及目前对其病因缺乏了解，关注阿尔茨海默病预防、治疗和护理方面的创新也至关重要，这引发了关于最优资源配置以及私人与社会激励一致性的问题。经济学家在理解阿尔茨海默病相关问题（包括药物开发、高效护理提供、动态契约、长期护理风险、财务决策以及阿尔茨海默病公共项目设计）方面有巨大贡献空间，这表明经济学多个领域存在丰富的研究议程。
27760.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PR；JEL：G41, G51, G52, I11, I13, J14, J22, O31

27759.title: Is the Cure Worse than the Disease? County-Level Evidence from the COVID-19 Pandemic in the United States
27759.zh_title: 治疗比疾病更糟糕吗？来自美国COVID-19大流行县级层面的证据
27759.authors: Catalina Amuedo-Dorantes, Neeraj Kaushal, Ashley N. Muchow
27759.abstract: Using county-level data on COVID-19 mortality and infections, along with county-level information on the adoption of non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs) in the United States, we examine how the speed of NPI adoption affected COVID-19 mortality. Our estimates suggest that advancing the date of NPI adoption by one day lowers the COVID-19 death rate by 2.4 percent. This finding proves robust to alternative measures of NPI adoption speed, model specifications that control for testing and mobility, and across various samples: national, restricted to the Northeast region, excluding New York, and excluding the Northeast region. We also find that the adoption speed of NPIs is associated with lower infections, as well as lower non-COVID mortality, suggesting that these measures slowed contagion and the pace at which the healthcare system might have been overburdened by the pandemic. Finally, NPI adoption speed appears to have been less relevant in Republican counties, suggesting that political ideology might have compromised their efficiency.
27759.zh_abstract: 利用美国COVID-19死亡率和感染率的县级数据，以及县级非药物干预措施采纳的信息，我们研究了非药物干预措施采纳速度如何影响COVID-19死亡率。我们的估计表明，将非药物干预措施采纳日期提前一天可使COVID-19死亡率降低2.4%。这一发现在非药物干预措施采纳速度的替代衡量指标、控制检测和流动性的模型设定以及各种样本（全国、仅限于东北地区、排除纽约、排除东北地区）中均保持稳健。我们还发现，非药物干预措施采纳速度与较低的感染率以及较低的非COVID死亡率相关，表明这些措施减缓了传染以及医疗系统可能因大流行而不堪重负的速度。最后，非药物干预措施采纳速度在共和党占多数的县似乎相关性较低，表明政治意识形态可能损害了其效率。

27758.title: Jacks of All Trades and Masters of One: Declining Search Frictions and Unequal Growth
27758.zh_title: 多面手与专才：下降的搜索摩擦与不平等增长
27758.abstract: Declining search frictions generate productivity growth by allowing workers to find jobs for which they are better suited. The return of declining search frictions on productivity varies across different types of workers. For workers who are “jacks of all trades”—in the sense that their productivity is nearly independent from the distance between their skills and the requirements of their job’ declining search frictions lead to minimal productivity growth. For workers who are “masters of one trade”—in the sense that their productivity is very sensitive to the gap between their individual skills and the requirements of their job—declining search frictions lead to fast productivity growth. As predicted by this view, we find that workers in routine occupations have low wage dispersion and growth, while workers in non-routine occupations have high wage dispersion and growth.
27758.zh_abstract: 下降的搜索摩擦通过允许工人找到更适合自己的工作来产生生产率增长。下降的搜索摩擦对生产率的回报因工人类型而异。对于“多面手”工人——即其生产率几乎不依赖于其技能与工作要求之间距离的工人——下降的搜索摩擦导致最小的生产率增长。对于“专才”工人——即其生产率对其个人技能与工作要求之间差距非常敏感的工人——下降的搜索摩擦导致快速的生产率增长。正如这一观点所预测的，我们发现从事常规职业的工人工资离散度和增长较低，而从事非常规职业的工人工资离散度和增长较高。

27757.title: Modern Infectious Diseases: Macroeconomic Impacts and Policy Responses
27757.zh_title: 现代传染病：宏观经济影响与政策应对
27757.authors: David E. Bloom, Michael Kuhn, Klaus Prettner
27757.abstract: We discuss and review literature on the macroeconomic effects of epidemics and pandemics since the late 20th century. First, we cover the role of health in driving economic growth and well-being and discuss standard frameworks for assessing the economic burden of infectious diseases. Second, we sketch a general theoretical framework to evaluate the tradeoffs policymakers must consider when addressing infectious diseases and their macroeconomic repercussions. In so doing, we emphasize the dependence of economic consequences on (i) disease characteristics; (ii) inequalities among individuals in terms of susceptibility, preferences, and income; and (iii) cross-country heterogeneities in terms of their institutional and macroeconomic environments. Third, we study pharmaceutical and nonpharmaceutical policies aimed at mitigating and preventing infectious diseases and their macroeconomic repercussions. Fourth, we discuss the health toll and economic impacts of five infectious diseases: HIV/AIDS, malaria, tuberculosis, influenza, and COVID-19. Although major epidemics and pandemics can take an enormous human toll and impose a staggering economic burden, early and targeted health and economic policy interventions can often mitigate both to a substantial degree.
27757.zh_abstract: 我们讨论并回顾了自20世纪末以来关于流行病和大流行宏观经济影响的文献。首先，我们涵盖了健康在推动经济增长和福祉中的作用，并讨论了评估传染病经济负担的标准框架。其次，我们勾勒了一个一般性理论框架，以评估政策制定者在应对传染病及其宏观经济后果时必须考虑的权衡。在此过程中，我们强调了经济后果对以下因素的依赖性：（i）疾病特征；（ii）个体在易感性、偏好和收入方面的不平等；以及（iii）国家间在制度和宏观经济环境方面的异质性。第三，我们研究了旨在减轻和预防传染病及其宏观经济后果的药物和非药物政策。第四，我们讨论了五种传染病（HIV/AIDS、疟疾、结核病、流感和COVID-19）的健康损失和经济影响。尽管重大流行病和大流行可能造成巨大的人员伤亡和沉重的经济负担，但早期且有针对性的卫生和经济政策干预通常可以在很大程度上减轻两者。
27757.meta: Programs：EFG, EH；JEL：D15, D58, E10, E20, I12, I15, I18, I31, O40

27756.title: An Instrumental Variable Approach to Dynamic Models
27756.zh_title: 动态模型的工具变量方法
27756.abstract: We present a new class of methods for identification and inference in dynamic models with serially correlated unobservables, which typically imply that state variables are econometrically endogenous. In the context of Industrial Organization, these state variables often reflect econometrically endogenous market structure. We propose the use of Generalized Instrument Variables methods to identify those dynamic policy functions that are consistent with instrumental variable (IV) restrictions. Extending popular "two-step" methods, these policy functions then identify a set of structural parameters that are consistent with the dynamic model, the IV restrictions and the data. We provide computed illustrations to both single-agent and oligopoly examples. We also present a simple empirical analysis that, among other things, supports the counterfactual study of an environmental policy entailing an increase in sunk costs.
27756.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一类新的方法，用于识别和推断具有序列相关不可观测因素的动态模型，这些因素通常意味着状态变量在计量经济学上是内生的。在产业组织背景下，这些状态变量通常反映计量经济学上内生的市场结构。我们建议使用广义工具变量方法来识别那些与工具变量限制一致的政策函数。扩展流行的“两步法”，这些政策函数随后识别出一组与动态模型、工具变量限制和数据一致的结构参数。我们提供了单主体和寡头垄断示例的计算说明。我们还提出了一个简单的实证分析，除其他外，支持对一项涉及沉没成本增加的环境政策进行反事实研究。

27755.title: Monopsony in Movers: The Elasticity of Labor Supply to Firm Wage Policies
27755.zh_title: 搬家者中的买方垄断：劳动力供给对企业工资政策的弹性
27755.authors: Ihsaan Bassier, Arindrajit Dube, Suresh Naidu
27755.abstract: We provide new estimates of the separations elasticity, a proximate determinant of the labor supply facing a firm with respect to hourly wage, using matched Oregon employer-employee data. Existing estimates using individual wage variation may be biased by mismeasured wages and use of wage variation unrelated to firm choices. We estimate the impact of the firm component of wage variation on separations using both firm fixed effects estimated from a wage equation as well as a matched IV event study around employment transitions between firms. Separations are a declining function of firm wage policies: we find that the implied firm-level labor supply elasticities generated are around 4, consistent with recent experimental and quasi-experimental evidence, and that they are approximately 3 to 4 times larger that those using individual wages. Further, we find lower separations elasticities for low wage workers, high turnover sectors, and periods of economic downturn but with little heterogeneity by urban status or labor market concentration. We conclude that monopsonistic competition is pervasive, and largely independent of forces driving classical monopsony.
27755.zh_abstract: 我们利用俄勒冈州匹配的雇主-雇员数据，提供了分离弹性的新估计，该弹性是企业在小时工资方面面临的劳动力供给的直接决定因素。现有使用个体工资变动的估计可能因工资测量误差以及使用了与企业选择无关的工资变动而产生偏差。我们通过工资方程估计的企业固定效应以及围绕企业间就业转换的匹配IV事件研究，估计了企业工资变动成分对分离的影响。分离是企业工资政策的递减函数：我们发现由此产生的隐含企业层面劳动力供给弹性约为4，与近期实验和准实验证据一致，并且比使用个体工资估计的弹性大约3到4倍。此外，我们发现低工资工人、高离职率行业以及经济衰退时期的分离弹性较低，但在城市地位或劳动力市场集中度方面几乎没有异质性。我们得出结论，买方垄断竞争是普遍存在的，并且在很大程度上独立于驱动经典买方垄断的力量。

27754.title: Centrino and the Restructuring of WI-FI Supply
27754.zh_title: 迅驰技术与Wi-Fi供应的重组
27754.abstract: In this paper we examine Intel’s launch of Centrino and interpret it as platform leader’s attempt to restructure a supply chain. We provide a narrative of key actions and how they coordinated changes and offer a framework of the predictable consequences for complementary markets. We then collect data and test these predictions on outcomes in several related complementary markets. The overall findings are consistent with our framework. We show that the launch of Centrino increased the likelihood of exit from internal and external Wi-Fi cards markets, and we find that the magnitude of the effect was largest for internal cards. We also show that the launch of Centrino’s stimulated product introduction in the markets for complements overall and find that the effect varied across type of routers. Finally, we show that experience with producing Wi-Fi cards shaped product introduction by router providers.
27754.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们考察了英特尔推出迅驰技术，并将其解读为平台领导者试图重组供应链的行为。我们叙述了关键行动以及它们如何协调变化，并提供了一个框架来预测对互补市场的可预见后果。然后，我们收集数据并在几个相关互补市场的结果上检验这些预测。总体发现与我们的框架一致。我们表明，迅驰技术的推出增加了从内部和外部Wi-Fi卡市场退出的可能性，并且我们发现这种效应的大小对于内部卡最大。我们还表明，迅驰技术的推出刺激了互补品市场的产品引入，并且发现这种效应因路由器类型而异。最后，我们表明，生产Wi-Fi卡的经验影响了路由器提供商的产品引入。

27753.title: Stable Income, Stable Family
27753.authors: Jason M. Lindo, Krishna Regmi, Isaac Swensen
27753.abstract: We document the effect of unemployment insurance generosity on divorce and fertility using an identification strategy that leverages state-level changes in maximum benefits over time and comparisons across workers who have been laid off and those that have not been laid off. The results indicate that higher maximum benefit levels mitigate the effects of layoffs. In particular, they mitigate increases in divorce associated with men’s layoffs; increases in separations associated with women’s layoffs; reductions in fertility associated with men’s layoffs; and increases in fertility associated with women’s layoffs.
27753.zh_abstract: 我们利用一种识别策略，该策略利用各州随时间变化的最高福利水平，以及比较被解雇工人和未被解雇工人，来记录失业保险慷慨程度对离婚和生育的影响。结果表明，更高的最高福利水平减轻了裁员的影响。具体来说，它们减轻了与男性裁员相关的离婚增加；减轻了与女性裁员相关的分居增加；减轻了与男性裁员相关的生育率下降；以及减轻了与女性裁员相关的生育率上升。
27753.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H53, I38, J12, J13, J16, J65

27752.title: Business Incomes at the Top
27752.abstract: Business income constitutes a large and increasing share of income and wealth at the top of the distribution. We discuss how tax policy treats and shapes how businesses are organized and how they distribute economic gains to owners, with the focus on closely-held and pass-through firms. These considerations influence whether and how labor and capital income is observed in economic data and feed into research controversies regarding the measurement of inequality and the progressivity of the tax code. We discuss the importance of these issues in the US, and highlight that limited evidence from other countries suggests that they are likely to be important elsewhere.
27752.zh_abstract: 商业收入在收入分配顶层构成收入与财富的很大且不断增长的份额。我们讨论了税收政策如何对待和塑造企业的组织形式以及它们如何向所有者分配经济收益，重点关注紧密持股企业和穿透实体。这些考虑因素影响劳动和资本收入是否以及如何在经济数据中被观察到，并引发了关于不平等衡量和税法累进性的研究争议。我们讨论了这些问题在美国的重要性，并强调来自其他国家的有限证据表明，这些问题在其他地方也可能很重要。
27752.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：D31, D33, E25, H24, H25, H32

27751.title: Investor Tax Credits and Entrepreneurship: Evidence from U.S. States
27751.zh_title: 投资者税收抵免与创业：来自美国各州的证据
27751.authors: Matthew R. Denes, Sabrina T. Howell, Filippo Mezzanotti, Xinxin Wang, Ting Xu
27751.abstract: Angel investor tax credits are used globally to spur high-growth entrepreneurship. Exploiting their staggered implementation in 31 U.S. states, we find that they increase angel investment yet have no significant impact on entrepreneurial activity. Two mechanisms explain these results: Crowding out of alternative financing and low sensitivity of professional investors to tax credits. With a large-scale survey and a stylized model, we show that low responsiveness among professional angels may reflect the fat-tailed return distributions that characterize high-growth startups. The results contrast with evidence that direct subsidies to firms have positive effects, raising concerns about promoting entrepreneurship with investor subsidies.
27751.zh_abstract: 天使投资者税收抵免在全球范围内被用于刺激高增长创业。利用美国31个州交错实施这些政策的情况，我们发现它们增加了天使投资，但对创业活动没有显著影响。两种机制解释了这些结果：替代性融资的挤出效应以及专业投资者对税收抵免的低敏感性。通过大规模调查和简化模型，我们表明专业天使投资者的低响应性可能反映了高增长初创企业所特有的厚尾回报分布。这些结果与直接补贴企业具有积极影响的证据形成对比，引发了对通过投资者补贴促进创业的担忧。
27751.meta: Programs：CF, PE, PR；JEL：G0, G14, G28, H0, H25, O3

27750.title: Property Rights to Land and Agricultural Organization: An Argentina-United States Comparison
27750.zh_title: 土地产权与农业组织：阿根廷与美国的比较
27750.authors: Eric C. Edwards, Martin Fiszbein, Gary D. Libecap
27750.abstract: The contributions of Harold Demsetz offer key insights on how property rights and transaction costs shape economic organization. This guides our comparison of agricultural organization in two comparable regions, the Argentine Pampas and the US Midwest. In the US, land was distributed in small parcels and actively traded. In the Pampas, land was distributed in large plots and trade was limited because land was a social and political asset as well as commercial. We analyze why this led to persistently larger farms, specialization in ranching, and peculiar tenancy contracts in Argentina, relative to the US. Our empirical analysis, based on county-level data for both regions, shows that geo-climatic factors cannot explain the observed differences in agricultural organization. We discuss implications for long-term economic development in Argentina.
27750.zh_abstract: 哈罗德·德姆塞茨的贡献提供了关于产权和交易成本如何塑造经济组织的关键见解。这指导我们对两个可比地区——阿根廷潘帕斯草原和美国中西部——的农业组织进行比较。在美国，土地以小地块分配并积极交易。在潘帕斯草原，土地以大块分配，交易受限，因为土地既是社会和政治资产，也是商业资产。我们分析了为什么这导致阿根廷相对于美国，农场规模持续更大、专业化于畜牧业以及出现特殊的租佃合同。我们基于两个地区县级数据的实证分析表明，地理气候因素无法解释观察到的农业组织差异。我们讨论了这对阿根廷长期经济发展的影响。
27750.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, IO, LE；JEL：K11, L1, L22, N2, N21, N22, N26, N5, N51, N52, N56, O13, Q12, Q15

27749.title: Remote Work and the Heterogeneous Impact of COVID-19 on Employment and Health
27749.zh_title: 远程工作与COVID-19对就业和健康的异质性影响
27749.authors: Manuela Angelucci, Marco Angrisani, Daniel M. Bennett, Arie Kapteyn, Simone G. Schaner
27749.abstract: This paper examines the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on employment and respiratory health for remote workers (i.e. those who can work from home) and non-remote workers in the United States. Using a large, nationally-representative, high-frequency panel dataset from March through July of 2020, we show that job losses were up to three times as large for non-remote workers. This gap is larger than the differential job losses for women, African Americans, Hispanics, or workers without college degrees. Non-remote workers also experienced relatively worse respiratory health, which likely occurred because it was more difficult for non-remote workers to protect themselves. Grouping workers by pre-pandemic household income shows that job losses and, to a lesser extent, health losses were highest among non-remote workers from low-income households, exacerbating existing disparities. Finally, we show that lifting non-essential business closures did not substantially increase employment.
27749.zh_abstract: 本文考察了COVID-19大流行对美国远程工作者（即那些可以在家工作的人）和非远程工作者的就业和呼吸系统健康的影响。使用2020年3月至7月期间一个大型、全国代表性、高频面板数据集，我们表明非远程工作者的失业率高达远程工作者的三倍。这一差距大于女性、非裔美国人、西班牙裔或没有大学学位的工人的失业率差异。非远程工作者的呼吸系统健康状况也相对更差，这可能是因为非远程工作者更难保护自己。按大流行前家庭收入对工人进行分组显示，失业以及（在较小程度上）健康损失在低收入家庭的非远程工作者中最高，加剧了现有的不平等。最后，我们表明解除非必要商业关闭并未显著增加就业。

27747.title: Doubling Down on Debt: Limited Liability as a Financial Friction
27747.zh_title: 债务加倍：有限责任作为金融摩擦
27747.authors: Jesse Perla, Carolin Pflueger, Michal Szkup
27747.abstract: We investigate how a combination of limited liability and preexisting debt distort firms’ investment and equity payout decisions. We show that equity holders have incentives to “double-sell” cash flows in default, leading to overinvestment, provided that the firm has preexisting debt and the ability to issue new claims to the bankruptcy value of the firm. In a repeated version of the model, we show that the inability to commit to not double-sell cash flows leads to heterogeneous investment distortions, where high leverage firms tend to overinvest but low leverage firms tend to underinvest. Permitting equity payouts financed by new debt mitigates overinvestment for high leverage firms, but raises bankruptcy rates and exacerbates low leverage firms’ tendency to underinvest—as the anticipation of equity payouts from future debt raises their cost of debt issuance. Finally, we provide empirical evidence consistent with the model.
27747.zh_abstract: 我们研究了有限责任和已有债务的组合如何扭曲企业的投资和股权支付决策。我们表明，只要企业有已有债务并且有能力对破产价值发行新债权，股权持有者就有动机在违约时“双重出售”现金流，从而导致过度投资。在模型的重复版本中，我们表明无法承诺不双重出售现金流会导致异质性的投资扭曲，其中高杠杆企业倾向于过度投资，而低杠杆企业倾向于投资不足。允许通过新债务融资的股权支付减轻了高杠杆企业的过度投资，但提高了破产率并加剧了低杠杆企业投资不足的倾向——因为对未来债务股权支付的预期提高了它们的债务发行成本。最后，我们提供了与模型一致的实证证据。

27746.title: International Evidence on Shock-Dependent Exchange Rate Pass-Through
27746.zh_title: 汇率传递的冲击依赖性：国际证据
27746.authors: Kristin Forbes, Ida Hjortsoe, Tsvetelina Nenova
27746.abstract: We analyse the economic conditions (the “shocks”) behind currency movements and show how that analysis can help address a range of questions, focusing on exchange rate pass-through to prices. We build on a methodology previously developed for the United Kingdom and adapt this framework so that it can be applied to a diverse sample of countries using widely available data. The paper provides three examples of how this enriched methodology can be used to provide insights on pass-through and other questions. First, it shows that exchange rate movements caused by monetary policy shocks consistently correspond to significantly higher pass-through than those caused by demand shocks in a cross-section of countries, confirming earlier results for the UK. Second, it shows that the underlying shocks (especially monetary policy shocks) are particularly important for understanding the time-series dimension of pass-through, while the standard structural variables highlighted in previous literature are most important for the cross-section dimension. Finally, the paper explores how the methodology can be used to shed light on the effects of monetary policy and the debate on "currency wars": it shows that the role of monetary policy shocks in driving the exchange rate has increased moderately since the global financial crisis in advanced economies.
27746.zh_abstract: 我们分析了货币波动背后的经济条件（即“冲击”），并展示了这一分析如何有助于解决一系列问题，重点关注汇率对价格的传递效应。我们基于先前为英国开发的方法论，并调整该框架，使其能够利用广泛可得的数据应用于多样化的国家样本。本文提供了三个例子，说明如何利用这种丰富的方法论来深入理解传递效应及其他问题。首先，它表明，在跨国截面中，由货币政策冲击引起的汇率变动始终对应着比需求冲击引起的汇率变动显著更高的传递效应，这证实了先前针对英国的研究结果。其次，它表明，潜在冲击（尤其是货币政策冲击）对于理解传递效应的时间序列维度特别重要，而先前文献中强调的标准结构性变量对于截面维度最为重要。最后，本文探讨了如何利用该方法论来阐明货币政策的影响以及关于“货币战争”的辩论：它表明，自全球金融危机以来，在发达经济体中，货币政策冲击在驱动汇率方面的作用已适度增强。

27745.title: Social Finance: Cultural Evolution, Transmission Bias and Market Dynamics
27745.zh_title: 社会金融：文化演化、传播偏差与市场动态
27745.abstract: The thoughts and behaviors of financial market participants depend upon adopted cultural traits, including information signals, beliefs, strategies, and folk economic models. Financial traits compete to survive in the human population, and are modified in the process of being transmitted from one agent to another. These cultural evolutionary processes shape market outcomes, which in turn feed back into the success of competing traits. This evolutionary system is studied in an emerging paradigm, social finance. In this paradigm, social transmission biases determine the evolution of financial traits in the investor population. It considers an enriched set of cultural traits, both selection on traits and mutation pressure, and market equilibrium at different frequencies. Other key ingredients of the paradigm include psychological bias, social network structure, information asymmetries, and institutional environment.
27745.zh_abstract: 金融市场参与者的思想和行为取决于所采纳的文化特质，包括信息信号、信念、策略和民间经济模型。金融特质在人类群体中竞争以求生存，并在从一个代理人传播到另一个代理人的过程中被修改。这些文化演化过程塑造了市场结果，而市场结果又反过来影响竞争特质的成败。这一演化系统在一个新兴范式——社会金融——中被研究。在该范式中，社会传播偏差决定了投资者群体中金融特质的演化。它考虑了更丰富的文化特质集合，包括对特质的选择和突变压力，以及不同频率下的市场均衡。该范式的其他关键要素包括心理偏差、社交网络结构、信息不对称和制度环境。

27744.title: Cheap Thrills: the Price of Leisure and the Global Decline in Work Hours
27744.zh_title: 廉价娱乐：休闲价格与全球工作时间的下降
27744.authors: Alexandr Kopytov, Nikolai Roussanov, Mathieu Taschereau-Dumouchel
27744.abstract: Recreation prices and hours worked have both fallen over the last century. We construct a macroeconomic model with general preferences that allows for trending recreation prices, wages, and work hours along a balanced-growth path. Estimating the model using aggregate data from OECD countries, we find that the fall in recreation prices can explain a large fraction of the decline in hours. We also use our model to show that the diverging prices of the recreation bundles consumed by different demographic groups can account for much of the increase in leisure inequality observed in the United States over the last decades.
27744.zh_abstract: 在过去一个世纪中，休闲价格和工作时间都下降了。我们构建了一个具有一般偏好的宏观经济模型，该模型允许休闲价格、工资和工作时间沿着平衡增长路径呈现趋势性变化。利用来自OECD国家的总体数据估计该模型，我们发现休闲价格的下降可以解释工作时间下降的很大一部分。我们还利用模型表明，不同人口群体所消费的休闲组合的价格差异，可以解释过去几十年在美国观察到的休闲不平等加剧的很大一部分。
27744.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IFM, LS；JEL：E24, J22, J32

27743.title: Does Vote Trading Improve Welfare?
27743.zh_title: 选票交易能改善福利吗？
27743.abstract: Voters have strong incentives to increase their influence by trading votes, a practice indeed believed to be common. But is vote trading welfare-improving or welfare-decreasing? We review the theoretical literature and, when available, its related experimental tests. We begin with the analysis of logrolling – the exchange of votes for votes, considering both explicit vote exchanges and implicit vote trades engineered by bundling issues in a single bill. We then focus on vote markets, where votes can be traded against a numeraire. We cover competitive markets, strategic market games, decentralized bargaining, and more centralized mechanisms, such as quadratic voting, where votes can be bought at a quadratic cost. We conclude with procedures allowing voters to shift votes across decisions – to trade votes with oneself only – such as storable votes or a modified form of quadratic voting. We find that vote trading and vote markets are typically inefficient; more encouraging results are obtained by allowing voters to allocate votes across decisions.
27743.zh_abstract: 选民有强烈的动机通过交易选票来增加其影响力，这种做法被认为很普遍。但选票交易是改善福利还是降低福利？我们回顾了理论文献，并在可用时回顾了相关的实验检验。我们从分析互投赞成票开始——即用选票交换选票，既考虑明确的选票交换，也考虑通过将议题捆绑在单一法案中而设计的隐性选票交易。然后，我们聚焦于选票市场，其中选票可以交换计价单位。我们涵盖了竞争性市场、策略性市场博弈、分散化议价以及更集中的机制，如二次投票，其中选票可以以二次成本购买。最后，我们讨论了允许选民在不同决策之间转移选票的程序——即仅与自己交易选票——例如可存储选票或二次投票的修改形式。我们发现，选票交易和选票市场通常是低效的；允许选民在不同决策之间分配选票则获得了更令人鼓舞的结果。

27742.title: Social Distancing, Vaccination and the Paradoxical Optimality of an Endemic Equilibrium
27742.zh_title: 社交距离、疫苗接种与地方病均衡的悖论最优性
27742.abstract: We analyze the impact of public health policy on the spread of a disease using a version of the SIR model that includes vital statistics, waning immunity, and vaccination. This model is rich enough to accommodate endemic steady states and disease-free steady states. We choose social distancing and vaccines to maximize an objective function that penalizes lost output resulting from social distancing, deaths resulting from the disease, and the cost of vaccination. Surprisingly, even though a disease-free equilibrium is attainable, optimal policy leads to an endemic steady state, though with a small number of deaths and negligible loss of output.
27742.zh_abstract: 我们使用包含生命统计、免疫力减弱和疫苗接种的SIR模型版本，分析了公共卫生政策对疾病传播的影响。该模型足够丰富，能够容纳地方病稳态和无病稳态。我们选择社交距离和疫苗，以最大化一个目标函数，该函数惩罚因社交距离导致的产出损失、因疾病导致的死亡以及疫苗接种成本。令人惊讶的是，尽管无病均衡是可以实现的，但最优政策导致了一个地方病稳态，尽管死亡人数很少且产出损失可以忽略不计。
27742.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, EH, ME；JEL：C61, E61, I18

27741.title: Pandemic Control in ECON-EPI Networks
27741.authors: Marina Azzimonti, Alessandra Fogli, Fabrizio Perri, Mark Ponder
27741.abstract: We develop an ECON-EPI network model to evaluate policies designed to improve health and economic outcomes during a pandemic. Relative to the standard epidemiological SIR set-up, we explicitly model social contacts among individuals and allow for heterogeneity in their number and stability. In addition, we embed the network in a structural economic model describing how contacts generate economic activity. We calibrate it to the New York metro area during the 2020 COVID-19 crisis and show three main results. First, the ECON-EPI network implies patterns of infections that better match the data compared to the standard SIR. The switching during the early phase of the pandemic from unstable to stable contacts is crucial for this result. Second, the model suggests the design of smart policies that reduce infections and at the same time boost economic activity. Third, the model shows that reopening sectors characterized by numerous and unstable contacts (such as large events or schools) too early leads to fast growth of infections.
27741.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个ECON-EPI网络模型，用于评估旨在改善大流行期间健康和经济结果的政策。相对于标准的流行病学SIR框架，我们明确建模了个人之间的社会接触，并允许其数量和稳定性存在异质性。此外，我们将该网络嵌入一个结构性经济模型中，描述接触如何产生经济活动。我们将其校准到2020年COVID-19危机期间的纽约大都市区，并展示了三个主要结果。首先，与标准SIR相比，ECON-EPI网络意味着更符合数据的感染模式。大流行早期阶段从不稳定接触到稳定接触的转换对于这一结果至关重要。其次，该模型建议设计既能减少感染又能同时促进经济活动的智能政策。第三，该模型表明，过早重新开放以大量和不稳定接触为特征的行业（如大型活动或学校）会导致感染快速增长。
27741.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, EH, PE, POL；JEL：D85, E23, E65, I18

27740.title: Financial Returns to Household Inventory Management
27740.zh_title: 家庭库存管理的财务回报
27740.authors: Scott R. Baker, Stephanie G. Johnson, Lorenz Kueng
27740.abstract: Households tend to hold substantial amounts of non-financial assets in the form of consumer goods inventories that are unobserved by traditional measures of wealth, about $\$725$ on average for products covered by our sample. Such holdings can eclipse total financial assets among households in the lowest income quintile. Households can obtain significant financial returns from strategically shopping and managing these inventories. In addition, they choose to maintain liquid savings—household working capital—not just for precautionary motives but also to support this inventory management. We demonstrate that households earn high marginal returns from investing in household working capital, well above 20% at low levels of inventory, though these marginal returns decline rapidly as inventory increases. Nevertheless, average returns from inventory management are high—about 50% for the typical household—and affect household portfolio returns substantially for all but the top income and asset quintiles. We provide evidence from scanner and survey data that supports this conclusion. For many households, working capital is therefore an important asset class that has been largely ignored by the household finance literature, and inventory management provides them with an alternative to investing in risky financial markets at low levels of liquid wealth.
27740.zh_abstract: 家庭倾向于以消费品库存的形式持有大量非金融资产，这些库存未被传统的财富衡量指标所观测，在我们的样本覆盖的产品中，平均约为725美元。对于最低收入五分位的家庭而言，此类持有量可能超过其总金融资产。家庭可以通过战略性购物和管理这些库存获得显著的财务回报。此外，他们选择维持流动性储蓄——家庭营运资本——不仅出于预防性动机，也是为了支持这种库存管理。我们证明，家庭从投资于家庭营运资本中获得高边际回报，在低库存水平时远高于20%，尽管随着库存增加，这些边际回报迅速下降。然而，库存管理的平均回报很高——对于典型家庭约为50%——并且对于除最高收入和资产五分位之外的所有家庭，都显著影响其投资组合回报。我们提供了来自扫描数据和调查数据的证据，支持这一结论。因此，对于许多家庭而言，营运资本是一个重要的资产类别，但一直被家庭金融文献所忽视，而库存管理为他们提供了一种在低流动性财富水平下替代投资于风险金融市场的选择。
27740.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：D11, D12, D13, D14, E21, G11, G51

27739.title: Global Business and Financial Cycles: A Tale of Two Capital Account Regimes
27739.zh_title: 全球商业与金融周期：两种资本账户体制的故事
27739.abstract: Using a new equity price-based measure of the global financial cycle, this paper evaluates the relative importance of global financial shocks for quarterly equity returns and output growths in a large sample of advanced and emerging economies, as well as in South Korea and China--two countries on different sides of the trilemma triangle of international finance. We document that global financial shocks in both China and South Korea explain a substantial share of equity return variability (20 and 50 percent of the total variance, respectively), but a much smaller portion of real output fluctuations (less than 10 percent in Korea and negligible in the case of China). We also find that the combination of a closer capital account and a more rigid exchange rate regime, as in China, is associated with some costs in terms of diversification opportunities quantified by very large exposures to domestic financial and real shocks, dwarfing the contribution of any other shock in the model. More surprisingly, the combination of a relatively open capital account and a flexible exchange rate, as in South Korea, not only is associated with higher exposure to the global financial cycle than in China but also with a significant incidence of domestic financial shocks on output fluctuations.
27739.zh_abstract: 本文利用一种基于股票价格的新全球金融周期衡量指标，评估了全球金融冲击对大量发达经济体和新兴经济体以及韩国和中国（处于国际金融三元悖论三角形不同两侧的两个国家）季度股票回报和产出增长的相对重要性。我们记录到，在中国和韩国，全球金融冲击解释了股票回报变动的很大一部分（分别占总方差的20%和50%），但对实际产出波动的解释份额要小得多（韩国低于10%，中国可忽略不计）。我们还发现，像中国那样更封闭的资本账户和更僵化的汇率制度的组合，与一些分散化机会的成本相关，这通过模型中对国内金融和实际冲击的巨大敞口来量化，使得模型中任何其他冲击的贡献相形见绌。更令人惊讶的是，像韩国那样相对开放的资本账户和灵活汇率的组合，不仅与比中国更高的全球金融周期敞口相关，而且还与国内金融冲击对产出波动的显著影响相关。
27739.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C38, E42, F44, G15

27738.title: Using a Satisficing Model of Experimenter Decision-Making to Guide Finite-Sample Inference for Compromised Experiments
27738.zh_title: 利用实验者决策的满意模型指导受损实验的有限样本推断
